seo.title: Outdoor Living | Maxima Pools - Columbus, OH
seo.description: Transform your backyard into an outdoor oasis. Custom kitchens, fire features, shade structures, lighting, and entertainment — designed and built in-house by Maxima Pools.
seo.ogDescription: Beautifully designed outdoor living spaces crafted to enhance comfort, entertainment, and relaxation. Serving Columbus, OH.

hero.subtitle: Beautifully designed outdoor living spaces crafted to enhance comfort, entertainment, and relaxation — seamlessly integrated with your pool and home.

vision.paragraph1: At Maxima Pools, we create outdoor spaces that blend seamlessly with your pool design, lifestyle, and home architecture. Our in-house designers and installers work as one team to deliver a cohesive, flawless result.
vision.paragraph2: From the first sketch to the final stone, every detail is custom-tailored to your vision — built with the same precision and quality that defines our pool installations.
points: In-house designers and installers — no outsourcing
Seamless integration with your pool design
Custom-tailored to your lifestyle and architecture
One team, one timeline, one flawless result
Serving Columbus, OH and surrounding areas

servicesSection.intro: Everything you need to create the ultimate outdoor experience — designed, built, and integrated by one team.

services.title: Custom Outdoor Kitchens
services.description: Built-in grills, pizza ovens, bars, and durable countertops designed for performance and style. Year-round entertaining with prep areas and weatherproof cabinetry.

services.title: Fire Features
services.description: Fire pits, fire bowls, and custom fireplaces that create a warm, inviting atmosphere. Gas-powered options with dancing flames that reflect beautifully off the water.

services.title: Shade Structures
services.description: Pergolas, gazebos, pavilions, and custom shelters engineered to blend with your home architecture while providing shade and structure for outdoor gatherings.

services.title: Outdoor Lighting
services.description: Professional landscape and architectural lighting that extends your enjoyment after sunset. Path lighting, accent lighting, and ambient LED solutions for safety and beauty.

services.title: Entertainment Add-Ons
services.description: Outdoor TVs, sound systems, and smart technology that bring indoor comfort outside. Weatherproof solutions built for year-round use.

services.title: Functional Upgrades
services.description: Sinks, storage, trash centers, and weatherproof cabinetry. Every detail is considered so your outdoor space is as practical as it is beautiful.

kitchensFeature.paragraph: Our custom outdoor kitchens are designed for performance and style. From built-in grills and pizza ovens to full bars with durable concrete countertops — everything is engineered for year-round entertaining.

lightingShade.title: Lighting That Elevates Every Moment
lightingShade.description: Professional landscape and architectural lighting extends your enjoyment after sunset — adding beauty, ambiance, and safety to every corner of your outdoor space.

lightingShade.title: Comfort, Style, and Protection
lightingShade.description: Custom pergolas, gazebos, and pavilions engineered to blend with your home while providing shade and structure for outdoor gatherings all year long.

finalCta.text: Tell us your vision and we'll bring it to life. One team, one timeline, one stunning outdoor space.
